name: RegEx

eventsFunctions.name: HasPattern
eventsFunctions.description: Checks if a string matches a regex pattern.

eventsFunctions.name: Split
eventsFunctions.fullName: Split a string into an array
eventsFunctions.description: Split a string by each part of it that matches a regex pattern and stores each part into an array.

eventsFunctions.name: GetAllMatches
eventsFunctions.fullName: Find all matches for a regex pattern
eventsFunctions.description: Builds an array containing all matches for a regex pattern.

eventsFunctions.name: GetFirstMatchAndGroups
eventsFunctions.fullName: Find first match with groups for a regex pattern
eventsFunctions.description: Builds an array containing the first match for a regex pattern followed by the regex groups.

eventsFunctions.name: GetAllMatchesAndGroups
eventsFunctions.fullName: Find all matches with their groups for a regex pattern
eventsFunctions.description: Builds an array containing for each regex pattern match an array with the match followed by its regex groups.

eventsFunctions.name: Replace
eventsFunctions.fullName: Replace pattern matches with a string
eventsFunctions.description: Replaces a part of a string that matches a regex pattern with another string.

eventsFunctions.name: Find
eventsFunctions.description: Finds a regex pattern in a string, and returns the index of the position of the match, or -1 if it doesn't match the pattern.

description:
Conditions, actions and expressions to use regular expressions with strings, such as:  
- Find the position of pattern in a string 
- Find a pattern in a string
- Split a string by a pattern
- Check if a string matches a pattern
- Replace patterns in a string with another string
